description: Style Note Understated and compact, yet spacious, this baggit's purse is designed to leave the onlookers bowled over by its awesome look and appeal. Add this to your accessory arsenal and you'll not regret it. The right bag for versatile styling, use this piece as a sling bag and wear it across your shoulder or simply carry your essentials, using it as a basic pouch. Product Details Brown purse with knitted detailing on the front Has one main zippered compartment One pocket in the front with magnetic press button flap closure One pocket with zip closure on the flap Has a brown coloured shoulder strapMaterial and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 13 cm Width: 11 cmDepth: 4 cm
